brand white.$description: Mutable brand white — #FAFAFA (light) / #071013 (dark). Swaps with theme. Primary light surface, becomes brand black in dark mode.

brand black.$description: Mutable brand black — #071013 (light) / #FAFAFA (dark). Swaps with theme. Primary dark text, becomes brand white in dark mode.

brand-white-constant.$description: Immutable brand white — #FAFAFA in all themes. For elements that must stay white regardless of mode (e.g. text on solid brand buttons).

brand-black-constant.$description: Immutable brand black — #071013 in all themes. For elements that must stay black regardless of mode (e.g. dark overlays, brand moments).

brand white.$description: Mutable brand white — #FAFAFA (light) / #071013 (dark). Swaps with theme. Primary light surface, becomes brand black in dark mode.

brand black.$description: Mutable brand black — #071013 (light) / #FAFAFA (dark). Swaps with theme. Primary dark text, becomes brand white in dark mode.

brand-white-constant.$description: Immutable brand white — #FAFAFA in all themes. For elements that must stay white regardless of mode (e.g. text on solid brand buttons).

brand-black-constant.$description: Immutable brand black — #071013 in all themes. For elements that must stay black regardless of mode (e.g. dark overlays, brand moments).

text-primary.$description: Primary text colour. Use for headings and body copy.

text-primary_on-brand.$description: Text on brand-coloured backgrounds. Always white.

text-secondary.$description: Secondary text. Slightly muted for supporting content.

text-tertiary.$description: Tertiary text. Use for labels and less prominent content.

text-quaternary.$description: Quaternary text. Least prominent — timestamps, metadata.

text-white.$description: White text. Use on dark/solid backgrounds. Always #FFF.

text-placeholder_subtle.$description: Subtle placeholder. Lower contrast than standard placeholder.

text-brand-primary.$description: Brand-coloured text. Use sparingly for emphasis.

text-brand-secondary.$description: Secondary brand text. Lighter brand tint.

text-brand-secondary_hover.$description: Hover state for secondary brand text.

text-error-primary.$description: Error text. Use for validation messages.

border-primary.$description: Primary border. Use for input fields and card edges.

fg-primary.$description: Primary foreground. Icons and decorative elements.

fg-white.$description: White foreground. Icons on dark/solid backgrounds. Always #FFF.

fg-brand-secondary_hover.$description: Hover state for secondary brand foreground.

bg-primary.$description: Primary background surface. Use for page backgrounds and main content areas.

bg-primary_alt.$description: Alternative primary background. Use for subtle differentiation from bg-primary.

bg-primary-solid.$description: Solid dark background. Immutable — stays dark in all themes.

bg-secondary.$description: Secondary background. Use for cards, panels, and elevated surfaces.

bg-secondary_subtle.$description: Subtle secondary background. Lighter than bg-secondary.

bg-tertiary.$description: Tertiary background. Use for nested containers and inset areas.

bg-overlay.$description: Overlay background for modals and scrims. Immutable — stays dark in all themes.

bg-brand-solid.$description: Solid brand background. Use for primary CTAs and brand moments.

bg-brand-solid_hover.$description: Hover state for solid brand background.

bg-brand-section.$description: Brand section background. Large area brand tint.

bg-error-solid.$description: Solid error background. High contrast for alerts.

bg-error-solid_hover.$description: Hover state for solid error background.

xxs.$description: 2px. Micro spacing — icon padding, tight gaps.

md.$description: 8px. Default spacing — form gaps, list items.

width-sm.$description: Max width constraint — 480px. Mobile large / small tablet.

paragraph-max-width.$description: Maximum paragraph line length — 720px. Optimal readability.

text-editor-icon-fg.$description: Default icon colour in text editor toolbar.

text-editor-icon-fg_active.$description: Active icon in text editor toolbar.

button-primary-icon.$description: Icon colour inside primary buttons. Always white.

button-primary-icon_hover.$description: Hover state for primary button icon.

button-destructive-primary-icon_hover.$description: Hover state for destructive primary button icon.

footer-button-fg_hover.$description: Hover state for footer button foreground.

focus-ring.$description: Focus ring colour for keyboard navigation. Brand accent.

focus-ring-error.$description: Focus ring colour for error state inputs.

shadow-xs.$description: Shadow colour for extra-small elevation (1 layer).

shadow-3xl_01.$description: Shadow layer 1 for 3xl elevation. Maximum depth.

shadow-3xl_02.$description: Shadow layer 2 for 3xl elevation. Maximum depth.

shadow-skeumorphic-inner.$description: Inner shadow for skeuomorphic depth effects.

shadow-skeumorphic-inner-border.$description: Inner border shadow for skeuomorphic depth effects.

blur-sm.$description: Small blur radius (8px). For subtle frosted effects.

blur-md.$description: Medium blur radius (16px). For card overlays.

blur-lg.$description: Large blur radius (24px). For modal backdrops.

blur-xl.$description: Extra large blur radius (40px). For hero backgrounds.

shadow-xs.$description: Shadow colour for extra-small elevation (1 layer).

shadow-3xl_01.$description: Shadow layer 1 for 3xl elevation. Maximum depth.

shadow-3xl_02.$description: Shadow layer 2 for 3xl elevation. Maximum depth.

shadow-skeumorphic-inner.$description: Inner shadow for skeuomorphic depth effects.

shadow-skeumorphic-inner-border.$description: Inner border shadow for skeuomorphic depth effects.

blur-sm.$description: Small blur radius (8px). For subtle frosted effects.

blur-md.$description: Medium blur radius (16px). For card overlays.

blur-lg.$description: Large blur radius (24px). For modal backdrops.

blur-xl.$description: Extra large blur radius (40px). For hero backgrounds.
